construction: 12 exact cases across minimal-evidence recurrence inference, 12-job constrained optimization, 17-person nested logic

cases.prompt:
This sequence is generated by a periodic recurrence over modular arithmetic. For n >= 4: a[n] = (p[n mod 4]*a[n-1] + q[n mod 4]*a[n-2] + t*a[n-3] + r*n + s) mod M. The unknown modulus M is exactly one of 97, 101, or 103. The 8 periodic coefficients p[0..3], q[0..3] are each one of -2, -1, 1, or 2. The global coefficient t is also one of those four values. The coefficient r is a nonzero integer from -4 through 4, and s is an integer from -4 through 4. Remainders are reported in the range 0 through M-1. Indexing begins at n=1. Infer and verify the unique system, then return the next 3 terms.

J2 | 12 | 18 | 9 | 13

- J5 may use only W or Y.

- J6 may not use Z.

- Exactly one of J10, J4, and J11 must use Z.
- Exactly one of J3, J4, and J8 must use Y.

Each person is either truthful or a liar. A truthful person's entire nested statement is true, while a liar's entire statement is false. T(X) means X is truthful. AND, OR, NOT, XOR, IFF, and IMPLIES have their standard Boolean meanings; OR is inclusive. EXACTLY(k; ...) is true when exactly k listed expressions are true. Determine the unique type of every person.

- A says: "IFF(XOR(AND(T(K), T(N)), OR(T(F), T(O))), IMPLIES(NOT(T(P)), OR(T(J), T(Q))))."
- B says: "IMPLIES(AND(OR(T(E), T(M)), EXACTLY(2; T(O); T(A); T(P))), AND(EXACTLY(2; T(J); T(G); T(M)), XOR(T(Q), T(E))))."
- C says: "IFF(OR(AND(T(D), T(H)), EXACTLY(1; T(Q); T(G); T(M))), IMPLIES(NOT(T(J)), AND(T(N), T(H))))."
- D says: "IFF(XOR(T(I), T(E)), EXACTLY(2; T(N); T(E); T(H)))."
- E says: "XOR(IFF(XOR(T(F), T(K)), OR(T(F), T(Q))), XOR(OR(T(A), T(P)), T(D)))."
- F says: "IMPLIES(NOT(T(J)), AND(T(O), T(B)))."
- G says: "OR(OR(EXACTLY(1; T(I); T(D); T(M)), NOT(T(Q))), AND(NOT(T(K)), XOR(T(Q), T(M))))."
- H says: "AND(OR(T(G), T(A)), XOR(T(I), T(M)))."
- I says: "OR(OR(OR(T(N), T(H)), EXACTLY(2; T(O); T(Q); T(C))), AND(T(D), T(M)))."
- J says: "OR(IFF(T(Q), OR(T(O), T(C))), XOR(T(A), AND(T(Q), T(G))))."
- K says: "IFF(OR(EXACTLY(1; T(J); T(G); T(A)), OR(T(J), T(F))), IFF(NOT(T(J)), XOR(T(O), T(C))))."
- L says: "AND(AND(T(B), T(K)), EXACTLY(2; T(N); T(M); T(E)))."
- M says: "AND(IMPLIES(XOR(T(F), T(N)), T(L)), XOR(EXACTLY(1; T(G); T(J); T(O)), T(J)))."
- N says: "XOR(XOR(T(B), T(J)), OR(T(A), T(I)))."
- O says: "IMPLIES(IMPLIES(NOT(T(K)), EXACTLY(1; T(H); T(P); T(G))), OR(NOT(T(H)), T(E)))."
- P says: "OR(IFF(NOT(T(M)), T(I)), OR(AND(T(J), T(I)), EXACTLY(2; T(F); T(H); T(J))))."
- Q says: "IMPLIES(XOR(T(I), T(D)), EXACTLY(1; T(N); T(O); T(P)))."

Each person is either truthful or a liar. A truthful person's entire nested statement is true, while a liar's entire statement is false. T(X) means X is truthful. AND, OR, NOT, XOR, IFF, and IMPLIES have their standard Boolean meanings; OR is inclusive. EXACTLY(k; ...) is true when exactly k listed expressions are true. Determine the unique type of every person.

- A says: "OR(OR(NOT(T(N)), OR(T(F), T(K))), XOR(XOR(T(L), T(N)), XOR(T(K), T(I))))."
- B says: "XOR(IMPLIES(EXACTLY(1; T(N); T(F); T(A)), AND(T(L), T(O))), XOR(T(C), T(Q)))."
- C says: "AND(EXACTLY(2; T(G); T(F); T(D)), XOR(T(J), T(G)))."
- D says: "OR(AND(T(N), T(L)), AND(T(I), T(Q)))."
- E says: "AND(IMPLIES(XOR(T(L), T(A)), XOR(T(C), T(P))), IFF(EXACTLY(2; T(A); T(C); T(P)), EXACTLY(2; T(G); T(L); T(B))))."
- F says: "IFF(AND(T(O), T(M)), NOT(T(N)))."
- G says: "IFF(NOT(T(L)), AND(T(D), T(B)))."
- H says: "IMPLIES(IMPLIES(XOR(T(E), T(B)), XOR(T(I), T(D))), XOR(OR(T(B), T(K)), XOR(T(F), T(O))))."
- I says: "AND(OR(NOT(T(O)), T(G)), AND(T(N), T(K)))."
- J says: "IMPLIES(AND(T(K), T(D)), EXACTLY(1; T(F); T(L); T(M)))."
- K says: "XOR(XOR(T(L), OR(T(B), T(M))), IMPLIES(AND(T(M), T(C)), EXACTLY(1; T(F); T(M); T(Q))))."
- L says: "OR(AND(NOT(T(P)), XOR(T(E), T(P))), XOR(XOR(T(F), T(B)), NOT(T(Q))))."
- M says: "IFF(IMPLIES(EXACTLY(2; T(F); T(L); T(P)), XOR(T(P), T(C))), XOR(XOR(T(O), T(J)), NOT(T(K))))."
- N says: "IMPLIES(IFF(XOR(T(I), T(K)), T(L)), OR(NOT(T(A)), AND(T(D), T(H))))."
- O says: "OR(IFF(T(L), OR(T(P), T(J))), IMPLIES(NOT(T(M)), OR(T(D), T(G))))."
- P says: "IFF(NOT(T(G)), AND(T(N), T(O)))."
- Q says: "OR(AND(NOT(T(P)), OR(T(B), T(A))), OR(OR(T(H), T(F)), OR(T(C), T(L))))."

Each person is either truthful or a liar. A truthful person's entire nested statement is true, while a liar's entire statement is false. T(X) means X is truthful. AND, OR, NOT, XOR, IFF, and IMPLIES have their standard Boolean meanings; OR is inclusive. EXACTLY(k; ...) is true when exactly k listed expressions are true. Determine the unique type of every person.

- A says: "OR(IMPLIES(EXACTLY(2; T(O); T(D); T(L)), T(E)), XOR(XOR(T(N), T(L)), NOT(T(J))))."
- B says: "IMPLIES(AND(NOT(T(H)), OR(T(O), T(L))), XOR(XOR(T(Q), T(L)), OR(T(G), T(N))))."
- C says: "AND(OR(OR(T(I), T(B)), EXACTLY(2; T(H); T(F); T(D))), AND(NOT(T(L)), OR(T(E), T(L))))."
- D says: "IFF(OR(OR(T(F), T(I)), EXACTLY(1; T(Q); T(E); T(H))), IFF(XOR(T(F), T(C)), EXACTLY(1; T(M); T(E); T(N))))."
- E says: "IMPLIES(IMPLIES(T(H), NOT(T(Q))), AND(NOT(T(Q)), NOT(T(G))))."
- F says: "OR(AND(T(N), T(G)), OR(T(N), T(A)))."
- G says: "OR(XOR(T(N), T(F)), EXACTLY(1; T(P); T(M); T(H)))."
- H says: "XOR(IFF(NOT(T(J)), NOT(T(K))), IMPLIES(OR(T(E), T(O)), NOT(T(C))))."
- I says: "OR(IMPLIES(NOT(T(M)), EXACTLY(1; T(F); T(P); T(L))), IMPLIES(AND(T(N), T(O)), XOR(T(G), T(A))))."
- J says: "OR(NOT(T(F)), OR(T(G), T(D)))."
- K says: "OR(IFF(AND(T(H), T(J)), OR(T(C), T(J))), OR(T(M), T(J)))."
- L says: "IFF(OR(T(H), XOR(T(C), T(N))), XOR(AND(T(J), T(O)), T(P)))."
- M says: "IMPLIES(OR(T(L), T(Q)), EXACTLY(1; T(B); T(K); T(I)))."
- N says: "AND(IMPLIES(XOR(T(Q), T(M)), T(I)), XOR(T(H), T(D)))."
- O says: "IMPLIES(T(K), OR(T(P), T(I)))."
- P says: "AND(NOT(T(F)), EXACTLY(1; T(O); T(A); T(I)))."
- Q says: "XOR(AND(OR(T(P), T(O)), EXACTLY(2; T(L); T(H); T(F))), IFF(EXACTLY(1; T(O); T(E); T(C)), EXACTLY(1; T(I); T(O); T(K))))."

Each person is either truthful or a liar. A truthful person's entire nested statement is true, while a liar's entire statement is false. T(X) means X is truthful. AND, OR, NOT, XOR, IFF, and IMPLIES have their standard Boolean meanings; OR is inclusive. EXACTLY(k; ...) is true when exactly k listed expressions are true. Determine the unique type of every person.

- A says: "IMPLIES(XOR(NOT(T(N)), T(G)), OR(XOR(T(L), T(C)), T(H)))."
- B says: "IFF(IMPLIES(OR(T(J), T(M)), AND(T(M), T(J))), IFF(EXACTLY(1; T(A); T(I); T(O)), NOT(T(A))))."
- C says: "IMPLIES(AND(T(J), XOR(T(N), T(Q))), IFF(XOR(T(D), T(G)), XOR(T(B), T(K))))."
- D says: "IMPLIES(XOR(EXACTLY(2; T(A); T(E); T(K)), EXACTLY(2; T(P); T(L); T(C))), IFF(XOR(T(A), T(O)), OR(T(L), T(H))))."
- E says: "XOR(XOR(T(D), T(I)), T(F))."
- F says: "XOR(AND(T(Q), T(Q)), XOR(EXACTLY(2; T(N); T(C); T(M)), AND(T(O), T(E))))."
- G says: "OR(AND(AND(T(E), T(L)), EXACTLY(1; T(H); T(Q); T(I))), AND(EXACTLY(2; T(J); T(D); T(F)), EXACTLY(2; T(I); T(A); T(Q))))."
- H says: "IMPLIES(XOR(T(K), T(I)), XOR(T(P), T(C)))."
- I says: "AND(AND(EXACTLY(2; T(M); T(K); T(L)), NOT(T(O))), XOR(OR(T(H), T(B)), NOT(T(A))))."
- J says: "OR(OR(T(O), T(F)), OR(T(G), T(O)))."
- K says: "IFF(AND(EXACTLY(1; T(D); T(F); T(E)), T(E)), OR(AND(T(Q), T(N)), XOR(T(E), T(P))))."
- L says: "AND(IMPLIES(NOT(T(F)), T(Q)), AND(EXACTLY(1; T(I); T(M); T(O)), OR(T(G), T(C))))."
- M says: "IFF(IFF(NOT(T(E)), OR(T(B), T(F))), IMPLIES(NOT(T(L)), EXACTLY(2; T(C); T(N); T(A))))."
- N says: "XOR(XOR(T(G), T(O)), NOT(T(P)))."
- O says: "OR(AND(T(A), T(B)), T(L))."
- P says: "IFF(T(H), XOR(T(Q), T(E)))."
- Q says: "AND(AND(AND(T(O), T(A)), AND(T(I), T(O))), AND(T(M), EXACTLY(2; T(B); T(J); T(D))))."
